initial_state: Package has BOM, routing/work-definition, and control plan members but no inspection plan.
expected_gate: Inspection plan member gate blocks release.
event_written: Rejected package validation event pending P31.
rollback_or_retry: Retry after adding released inspection plan member.
failure_if_missing: Production can run without inspection plan.

initial_state: Package contains NC program member with expected checksum A and controller/actual checksum B.
expected_gate: NC checksum gate compares expected and actual/controller checksum.
audit_or_evidence: Evidence includes expected and actual checksum.
rollback_or_retry: Retry after corrected NC release package or controller download verification.
failure_if_missing: Wrong CNC program can be released to shopfloor.

initial_state: Package is released with BOM version 1; BOM version 2 appears later.
command_or_action: Attempt to mutate released package member to BOM version 2.
expected_gate: Released package/member immutability gate blocks mutation and requires successor package.
data_written: No member mutation on released package.
audit_or_evidence: Evidence links old package, new package, and ECO.
rollback_or_retry: Retry through successor package release command.
failure_if_missing: Running work silently switches material definition.

initial_state: WO is about to release against package ERP-1 with member hashes.
command_or_action: Bind WO to engineering package snapshot.
expected_gate: Snapshot builder freezes package hash and member manifest hash.
audit_or_evidence: Evidence includes package hash and member manifest hash.
rollback_or_retry: Retry idempotently with same package hash.
failure_if_missing: WO cannot prove which engineering baseline it ran on.

initial_state: Customer-specific package has BOM/routing/control/inspection members but no customer approval evidence.
expected_gate: Customer approval evidence gate blocks release.
audit_or_evidence: Evidence links customer and missing approval type.
rollback_or_retry: Retry after approved customer approval member or approval hook.
failure_if_missing: Customer-specific part can run without customer approval.

initial_state: Generated table registry lacks new P30 package tables.
command_or_action: Attempt generic CRUD mutation of package member.
expected_gate: Generic CRUD fallback denylist blocks table even when generated registry is stale.
audit_or_evidence: Evidence points to governed registry and fallback denylist.
rollback_or_retry: Retry only through future command endpoint.
expected_result: Blocked by Generic CRUD hard stop.
failure_if_missing: Generated registry lag reopens unsafe mutation.
